_comment: PoE Betrayal Syndicate member reference. Division affinities and safehouse rewards.

members.name: Cameria the Coldblooded
members.notes: One of the best members for scarab rewards. Keep in Research or Fortification for maximum value.

members.name: Elreon, Loremaster

safehouse_rewards.Research: Crafting bench recipe (Prefixes/Suffixes Cannot Be Changed)

members.notes: Research safehouse gives the extremely valuable 'Prefixes/Suffixes Cannot Be Changed' crafting recipe. Highest priority Research member.

members.name: Gravicius Publicani
members.notes: Fortification safehouse can give 6-linked armour pieces. Good for selling to other players.

members.name: Guff the Tourney Man
members.notes: Low-priority member. Transportation safehouse gives mediocre maps.

members.name: Haku, Warmaster
members.notes: Fortification safehouse gives life and armour crafting recipes. Good pairing with Elreon for crafting setups.

members.name: Hillock the Thunderbrute
members.notes: Transportation safehouse gives valuable quality crafting recipes. Best member for improving gem/flask quality.

members.name: It that Fled
members.notes: Research gives unique maps which can be valuable. Keep in Research if farming unique map targets.

members.name: Janus Perandus
members.notes: Transportation safehouse provides Perandus coins and Cadiro deal access. Very league-dependent in value.

members.name: Jorgin the Organist
members.notes: Research safehouse gives talisman crafting which is situationally useful for specific build optimizations.

members.name: Korell the Rapacious
members.notes: Low-priority unless specifically farming weapon crafting recipes.

members.name: Leo Redmane

safehouse_rewards.Intervention: Crafting bench recipe (Prefixes/Suffixes Cannot Be Changed — lesser variant)

members.notes: Intervention safehouse gives a crafting recipe. Lower priority than Elreon for most builds.

members.name: Rin Yuushu
members.notes: Transportation safehouse gives good maps. Useful for sustaining map pool.

members.name: Riker Maloney
members.notes: Generally low value. Only useful when targeting specific unique flasks.

members.name: Rog the Chieftain
members.notes: Intervention safehouse gives Expedition artifacts. Best for players farming Expedition content.

members.name: Serva the Corrupt

safehouse_rewards.Research: Crafting bench recipe (corruption-adjacent: remove crafted mod)

members.notes: 'Remove Crafted Mod' recipe from Research is very valuable for specific crafting sequences.

members.name: Skultus the Flesh-Sculptor

safehouse_rewards.Research: Crafting bench recipe (flask mods: immune suffix)

members.notes: Research safehouse gives flask immune crafting (e.g., 'Bubbling' / immune to bleeding). Useful for character setup early.

members.name: Specter Syndicate member (Syndicate Operative)
members.notes: Placeholder/filler member. No significant rewards.

members.name: Tora, Master of the Hunt
members.notes: Research safehouse gives gem crafting recipes. Valuable for quality and level crafts on gems.

members.name: Aisling Laffrey
members.notes: 'Add/Remove Influence' recipe from Transportation is extremely valuable. Top-priority member for end-game crafting.

members.name: Catarina, Master of the Dead

safehouse_rewards.Research: Crafting bench recipes (Suffix Cannot Be Changed / full suite)

members.notes: Catarina is the Research Mastermind leader. Her safehouse gives the complete 'Cannot Be Changed' crafting recipe suite — the most valuable Betrayal reward for end-game crafting.

members.name: Vorici, Master Assassin

safehouse_rewards.Transportation: Crafting bench recipe (white sockets, color sockets)

members.notes: Transportation safehouse gives white socket crafting. Extremely valuable — white sockets work with any skill gem color. High priority for endgame builds.

members.name: Vagan, Weaponmaster

safehouse_rewards.Intervention: Crafting bench recipe (attack speed, damage mods)

members.notes: Intervention safehouse gives attack crafting recipes. Good for melee/attack build crafting.
